zh.Berkel Enrodenrijs,,,,PAYS-BAS,: 荷蘭-拉藍德貝可爾 恩 洛登利斯
zh.lifeSummary: 當Walter VI Berthold de MECHELEN於1185年5月29日出生在荷蘭-拉藍德貝可爾 恩 洛登利斯時，他的父親Graaf Wouter Berthout III Gerard26歲，母親Sophia van Loon22歲。他於大約1220年與Adeline d'ENGHIEN結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1243年4月17日在他的家鄉享年57歲。

zh-hans.Berkel Enrodenrijs,,,,PAYS-BAS,: 荷兰-拉藍德貝可爾 恩 洛登利斯
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Walter VI Berthold de MECHELEN于1185年5月29日出生在荷兰-拉藍德貝可爾 恩 洛登利斯时，他的父亲Graaf Wouter Berthout III Gerard26岁，母亲Sophia van Loon22岁。他于大约1220年与Adeline d'ENGHIEN结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于1243年4月17日在他的家乡享年57岁。

en.Berkel Enrodenrijs,,,,PAYS-BAS,: Berkel en Rodenrijs, South Holland, Netherlands

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Walter
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from wald ‘rule’ + heri, hari ‘army’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to England, superseding the native Old English form, Wealdhere. It was a very popular name in medieval England, normally pronounced ‘Water’.

variants.name: Walther
meanings: from wald ‘rule’ + heri ‘army’; name of the famous medieval minnesinger Walther von der Vogelweide ( c.1170– c.1230 ).

nameMeanings.name: VI
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Violet  ,   Vivien  , or   Vivian .

variants.name: Vivien
meanings: Earlier generally taken as a variant of the boy's name Vivian , but now also rarely used for boys. This spelling was quite common in Old French. Its use as a girl's name in the English-speaking world was influenced by Tennyson's Merlin and Vivien ( 1859 ). This name, from Arthurian legend, may represent an altered form of a Celtic name (perhaps akin to the Irish Gaelic name Béibhinn ‘white lady’, pronounced ‘bee-veen’). The actress Vivien Leigh ( 1913–67 ) was christened Vivian.

variants.name: Violet
meanings: From the name of the flower (Old French violette, Late Latin violetta, a diminutive of viola). This was one of the earliest flower names to become popular in Britain, being used as early as 1700 and becoming well established in the 19th century, although it is now somewhat out of favour.

variants.name: Vivian
meanings: Originally a boy's name, from an Old French form of the Latin name Vivianus (probably a derivative of vivus ‘alive’), but now more frequent as a girl's name. The name was borne by a 5th-century bishop of Saintes in western France, remembered for protecting his people during the invasion of the Visigoths.

nameMeanings.name: Berthold
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Walter VI Berthold de MECHELEN was born on 29 May 1185, in Berkel en Rodenrijs, South Holland, Netherlands, his father, Graaf Wouter Berthout III Gerard, was 26 and his mother, Sophia van Loon, was 22. He married Adeline d'ENGHIEN about 1220. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died on 17 April 1243, in his hometown, at the age of 57.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Walter VI Berthold de MECHELEN est né le 29 mai 1185, à Berkel en Rodenrijs, Hollande-Méridionale, Pays-Bas, son père, Graaf Wouter Berthout III Gerard, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Sophia van Loon, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Adeline d'ENGHIEN environ 1220. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé le 17 avril 1243, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 57 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Walter VI Berthold de MECHELEN am 29. Mai 1185 in Berkel en Rodenrijs, Südholland, Niederlande geboren wurde, war sein Vater Graaf Wouter Berthout III Gerard 26 und seine Mutter Sophia van Loon 22. Er hat um 1220 Adeline d'ENGHIEN geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb am 17. April 1243 im Alter von 57 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Walter VI Berthold de MECHELEN è nato il il 29 maggio 1185 nel Berkel en Rodenrijs, Zuid-Holland, Paesi Bassi, il suo padre, Graaf Wouter Berthout III Gerard, aveva 26 anni e il suo madre, Sophia van Loon, aveva 22 anni. Lui sposato Adeline d'ENGHIEN circa 1220. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì il 17 aprile 1243, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 57 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Walter VI Berthold de MECHELENが1185年5月29日にオランダズイド-hオランドバーケル ン ロデンリジスで生まれた時，父Graaf Wouter Berthout III Gerardは26歳，母Sophia van Loonは22歳であった。約1220年にAdeline d'ENGHIENと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1243年4月17日に故郷で57歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Walter VI Berthold de MECHELEN(이)가 1185년 5월 29일 네덜란드 주이드-홀랜드 버클  로데리j스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Graaf Wouter Berthout III Gerard(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Sophia van Loon(은)는 22세였다. 그는 대략 1220년 Adeline d'ENGHIEN(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1243년 4월 17일 그의 고향에서 57세의 나이로 사망했다.

Ele casou-se com Adeline d'ENGHIEN aproximadamente 1220. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu em 17 de abril de 1243, em sua cidade natal, com 57 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Walter VI Berthold de MECHELEN родился 29 мая 1185 г. в местности биркел эн роденриджс, зуид-холланд, Нидерланды, его отцу по имени Graaf Wouter Berthout III Gerard было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Sophia van Loon, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Adeline d'ENGHIEN около 1220 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер 17 апреля 1243 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 57 лет.

Se casó con Adeline d'ENGHIEN aproximadamente 1220. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió el 17 de abril de 1243, en su pueblo, a la edad de 57 años.
